text:
/ci1 2 そんなに遠回りが好きなのかな？
まあ、止めはしないよ。
時間は無限に近いほど、あるからね。

/ci1 2 An ardent devotee of the scenic route,
I see. Don't let me stop you, of course.
We have a nigh-infinite amount of time.
